name: Tom Lester's Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a bundt pan or round cake pan with butter.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour and granulated sugar. Stir in the eggs, melted butter, and molasses until well mixed.
4. Fold in the candied fruits, dried fruits, shelled nuts, and baking soda dissolved in the molasses.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 3-4 hours or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool before removing it from the pan.
